settings.warranty_text: Enjoy long-lasting confidence with our limited lifetime warranty on kitchen cabinets.
settings.sample_desc: Sample cost applied to your full order

settings.title: Highest Quality Woods
settings.description: We source only premium, sustainable North American timber for solid, warp-resistant frames.

settings.title: Unbeatable Price
settings.description: By manufacturing direct-to-consumer, we bypass retail markups saving you 40%.

settings.title: Dovetail Joinery
settings.description: Our drawer boxes feature traditional interlocking dovetail joints for superior lifetime strength.

settings.title: Fast Lead Times
settings.description: Stock lines ship in 7-14 days. Custom finishes are delivered rapidly in 4-6 weeks.

settings.title: Lifetime Warranty
settings.description: Fully guaranteed. We stand by our craftsmanship for as long as you own your home.

settings.title: Free 3D Design
settings.description: Work 1-on-1 with architectural designers to perfectly visualize your space before ordering.
Our designers use proprietary 3D rendering to map exact cabinetry structures into your space with millimeter precision — before a single board is cut.
